description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Probably the same scribe as T-S 13J34.5 (Alexandria, 1090 CE), T-S 13J35.5, and T-S AS 117.131 (PGPID 38280). Mentions Avraham the Byzantine scribe (who also features in Bodl. MS heb. d 66/43). Twice mentions sūq al-bazz (the clothiers' market). The substance of the letter is a dispute involving the writer and the cantor and the synagogue service. On verso there are piyyutim.
